title: hieracium florentinum subsp. praealtum
intro: Hieracium florentinum subsp. praealtum, a lesser-known species of the Hieracium genus, is a type of flowering plant that is native to Europe and Asia. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and protecting against cell damage. Hieracium florentinum subsp. praealtum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for use in herbal remedies.
